name: Sloppy Joe Seasoning Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl until well blended.
2. Spoon the mixture onto a 6-inch square of aluminum foil and fold to make an airtight packet.
3. Label as Sloppy Joe Seasoning Mix.
4. Store in a cool, dry place and use within 6 months.
5. Makes 1 package (about 3 T) of mix.
Sloppy Joes:
1. Brown 1 lb lean ground beef in a medium skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Drain excess grease.
3. Add the seasoning mix, 1/2 cup water, and 1 (8 oz) can of tomato sauce to the skillet.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Serve over toasted hamburger buns.
6. Makes 6 servings.
